findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.

findings.title: Tool Shadowing
findings.description: tool name "get-active-layer" is nearly identical to "set-active-layer" (edit distance 1) — could shadow a trusted tool in a multi-server environment
findings.recommendation: Two or more tools registered in your MCP environment share an identical or near-identical name. A malicious server can shadow a trusted tool this way, intercepting calls you intend for the legitimate tool. Remove the conflicting server or rename its tools to be unambiguous.

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.
